const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|legal|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Ruckelshaus Monsanto \"highly regulated\" trade secret",filed_before:"2026-07-17",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court_citation_string","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:8}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="image") image(c); else if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"compelled speech \"information asymmetries\" Amestoy",filed_before:"2026-07-17",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court_citation_string","absolute_url"],num_results:8}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="image") image(c); else if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }
